expectations.text: Generated SKILL.md contains both 'name:' and 'description:' YAML frontmatter fields
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md opens with '---' on line 1, followed by 'name: client-reporting-pdca' and 'description:' fields. Verified by byte-level check in agent run — repr(first_line) == '---' confirmed.

expectations.text: SKILL.md name field contains domain-specific terms (client, report, consulting) not just generic 'pdca'
SKILL.md description contains domain-specific terms like 'client', 'report', 'weekly', or 'status'
expectations.evidence: Description contains 'weekly client status report production for consulting firms'.

expectations.text: working-agreements.md contains 'STOP' with at least one specific trigger condition
expectations.evidence: 3 'Stop if AI...' conditions: sending without account lead approval, listing risk without source, writing resourcing recommendations without approval.

expectations.text: A gate specifically around the account lead review or risks section exists in phase-prompts.md or working-agreements.md
expectations.evidence: 'The send decision: the account lead must explicitly approve the report before it is sent' and 'Every recommendation: AI may draft candidate language, but the account lead must' — explicit, named gates in working-agreements.md.

expectations.text: Transcript shows questions were asked in sequential layers, not all at once
expectations.evidence: discovery-summary.md documents 5 layers in sequence with distinct answers per layer. Agent confirmed all 5 layers were run before confirmation gate.

expectations.text: A summary was presented for human confirmation before generating skill files
expectations.evidence: Agent documented confirmation gate as a distinct step before file generation per the discovery-guide.md framework.

expectations.text: After-generation instructions include /skill-creator as a validation step before production use
expectations.evidence: Agent delivered the After Generation message including step 4: 'Validate with /skill-creator before using in production. Run /skill-creator on the client-reporting-pdca/ directory. It will: Verify the SKILL.md format... Run with-skill vs. without-skill eval comparisons... A skill that hasn't been through eval is an untested assumption.'
